system.description:
A large curved dipylon, figure-eight, rectangular, or round shield. Dismounted only: +1 AC, 1 stone. Counts as a shield for the Defend action. Cannot be strapped on the back. Does not protect a vulnerable character.

Judges Journal optional shield rules (pp. 407–408). Enable the shield-variant overlay to apply the type-specific rules; otherwise it behaves as a standard +1 AC shield.
